mapper.insert:
insert into his_mirror_consume_link ( id, tenant_id, visit_kind, mirror_row_id, fetch_batch_id, dept_batch_consume_id, dept_batch_consume_entry_id, traceability_id, traceability_entry_id, write_off_dept_id, alloc_qty, dep_inventory_id, gz_dep_inventory_id, stk_dep_end_date, in_hospital_code, returned_qty, refundable_remaining_qty, create_time, del_flag ) values
(#{e.id}, #{e.tenantId}, #{e.visitKind}, #{e.mirrorRowId}, #{e.fetchBatchId}, #{e.deptBatchConsumeId}, #{e.deptBatchConsumeEntryId}, #{e.traceabilityId}, #{e.traceabilityEntryId}, #{e.writeOffDeptId}, #{e.allocQty}, #{e.depInventoryId}, #{e.gzDepInventoryId}, #{e.stkDepEndDate}, #{e.inHospitalCode}, ifnull(#{e.returnedQty}, 0), #{e.refundableRemainingQty}, #{e.createTime}, ifnull(#{e.delFlag}, 0))
mapper.select: select distinct ifnull(h.bill_source, '') from his_mirror_consume_link l inner join t_hc_ks_xh h on h.id = l.dept_batch_consume_id and ifnull(h.del_flag, 0) = 0 where l.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and l.visit_kind = #{visitKind} and l.mirror_row_id = #{mirrorRowId} and ifnull(l.del_flag, 0) = 0 and l.dept_batch_consume_id is not null and (ifnull(l.alloc_qty, 0) - ifnull(l.returned_qty, 0)) > 0

select l.id as linkId, l.visit_kind as visitKind, l.mirror_row_id as mirrorRowId, l.alloc_qty as allocQty, l.create_time as createTime, t.id as consumeBillId, t.trace_no as consumeBillNo, coalesce(t.audit_date, t.create_time) as consumeBillDate, 'CONSUME' as recordType, 0 as reverseFlag, null as reverseOfBillNo, t.order_status as consumeBillStatus, te.id as consumeEntryId, te.material_name as materialName, te.batch_no as batchNo, null as batchNumber, te.charge_price as unitPrice, coalesce(l.alloc_qty, te.quantity) as entryQty, case when te.charge_price is not null and coalesce(l.alloc_qty, te.quantity) is not null then te.charge_price * coalesce(l.alloc_qty, te.quantity) else null end as amt, null as beginTime, null as endTime, trim(ifnull(te.in_hospital_code, l.in_hospital_code)) as inHospitalCode, coalesce(l.write_off_dept_id, t.write_off_dept_id) as writeOffDeptId, wod.name as writeOffDeptName from his_mirror_consume_link l inner join gz_traceability t on t.id = l.traceability_id and ifnull(t.del_flag, 0) = 0 and t.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and t.trace_source = 'HIS_MIRROR_HIGH' inner join gz_traceability_entry te on te.id = l.traceability_entry_id and ifnull(te.del_flag, 0) = 0 and te.tenant_id = l.tenant_id left join fd_department wod on wod.id = coalesce(l.write_off_dept_id, t.write_off_dept_id) where l.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and l.visit_kind = #{visitKind} and l.mirror_row_id = #{mirrorRowId} and ifnull(l.del_flag, 0) = 0 and l.traceability_id is not null
union all
select l.id as linkId, l.visit_kind as visitKind, l.mirror_row_id as mirrorRowId, l.alloc_qty as allocQty, l.create_time as createTime, h.id as consumeBillId, h.consume_bill_no as consumeBillNo, coalesce(h.audit_date, h.create_time, h.consume_bill_date) as consumeBillDate, 'CONSUME' as recordType, ifnull(h.reverse_flag, 0) as reverseFlag, h.reverse_of_bill_no as reverseOfBillNo, h.consume_bill_status as consumeBillStatus, e.id as consumeEntryId, e.material_name as materialName, e.batch_no as batchNo, e.batch_number as batchNumber, e.unit_price as unitPrice, e.qty as entryQty, e.amt as amt, e.begin_time as beginTime, e.end_time as endTime, case when trim(ifnull(e.main_barcode, '')) != '' then trim(ifnull(e.main_barcode, '')) else trim(ifnull(e.sub_barcode, '')) end as inHospitalCode, coalesce(l.write_off_dept_id, h.department_id) as writeOffDeptId, wod.name as writeOffDeptName from his_mirror_consume_link l inner join t_hc_ks_xh h on h.id = l.dept_batch_consume_id and ifnull(h.del_flag, 0) = 0 and h.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and ifnull(h.reverse_flag, 0) = 0 and h.bill_source = 'HIS_MIRROR_ROW_HIGH' left join t_hc_ks_xh_entry e on e.id = l.dept_batch_consume_entry_id and ifnull(e.del_flag, 0) = 0 left join fd_department wod on wod.id = coalesce(l.write_off_dept_id, h.department_id) where l.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and l.visit_kind = #{visitKind} and l.mirror_row_id = #{mirrorRowId} and ifnull(l.del_flag, 0) = 0 and l.dept_batch_consume_id is not null

select l.id as linkId, l.visit_kind as visitKind, l.mirror_row_id as mirrorRowId, abs(ifnull(re.qty, 0)) as allocQty, coalesce(h.audit_date, h.create_time) as createTime, h.id as consumeBillId, h.consume_bill_no as consumeBillNo, coalesce(h.audit_date, h.create_time, h.consume_bill_date) as consumeBillDate, 'REVERSE' as recordType, 1 as reverseFlag, h.reverse_of_bill_no as reverseOfBillNo, h.consume_bill_status as consumeBillStatus, re.id as consumeEntryId, re.material_name as materialName, re.batch_no as batchNo, re.batch_number as batchNumber, re.unit_price as unitPrice, re.qty as entryQty, re.amt as amt, re.begin_time as beginTime, re.end_time as endTime, case when trim(ifnull(re.main_barcode, '')) != '' then trim(ifnull(re.main_barcode, '')) else trim(ifnull(re.sub_barcode, '')) end as inHospitalCode, coalesce(l.write_off_dept_id, h.department_id) as writeOffDeptId, wod.name as writeOffDeptName from his_mirror_consume_link l inner join t_hc_ks_xh_entry fe on fe.id = l.dept_batch_consume_entry_id and ifnull(fe.del_flag, 0) = 0 and fe.tenant_id = l.tenant_id inner join t_hc_ks_xh_entry re on re.src_consume_entry_id = fe.id and ifnull(re.del_flag, 0) = 0 and re.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and re.qty < 0 inner join t_hc_ks_xh h on h.id = re.paren_id and ifnull(h.del_flag, 0) = 0 and h.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and ifnull(h.reverse_flag, 0) = 1 left join fd_department wod on wod.id = coalesce(l.write_off_dept_id, h.department_id) where l.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and l.visit_kind = #{visitKind} and l.mirror_row_id = #{mirrorRowId} and ifnull(l.del_flag, 0) = 0 and l.dept_batch_consume_entry_id is not null

select id, tenant_id as tenantId, visit_kind as visitKind, mirror_row_id as mirrorRowId, fetch_batch_id as fetchBatchId, dept_batch_consume_id as deptBatchConsumeId, dept_batch_consume_entry_id as deptBatchConsumeEntryId, traceability_id as traceabilityId, traceability_entry_id as traceabilityEntryId, alloc_qty as allocQty, dep_inventory_id as depInventoryId, gz_dep_inventory_id as gzDepInventoryId, stk_dep_end_date as stkDepEndDate, in_hospital_code as inHospitalCode, returned_qty as returnedQty, refundable_remaining_qty as refundableRemainingQty, create_time as createTime from his_mirror_consume_link where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and visit_kind = #{visitKind} and mirror_row_id = #{mirrorRowId} and ifnull(del_flag, 0) = 0 and coalesce(refundable_remaining_qty, alloc_qty - ifnull(returned_qty, 0)) > 0
and dep_inventory_id is not null
and gz_dep_inventory_id is not null
mapper.update: update his_mirror_consume_link set returned_qty = ifnull(returned_qty, 0) + #{delta}, refundable_remaining_qty = ifnull(alloc_qty, 0) - (ifnull(returned_qty, 0) + #{delta}), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and ifnull(del_flag, 0) = 0

update his_mirror_consume_link set returned_qty = @new_ret := greatest(0, ifnull(returned_qty, 0) - #{delta}), refundable_remaining_qty = ifnull(alloc_qty, 0) - @new_ret, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and ifnull(del_flag, 0) = 0
mapper.select: select id, tenant_id as tenantId, visit_kind as visitKind, mirror_row_id as mirrorRowId, fetch_batch_id as fetchBatchId, dept_batch_consume_id as deptBatchConsumeId, dept_batch_consume_entry_id as deptBatchConsumeEntryId, traceability_id as traceabilityId, traceability_entry_id as traceabilityEntryId, alloc_qty as allocQty, dep_inventory_id as depInventoryId, gz_dep_inventory_id as gzDepInventoryId, returned_qty as returnedQty, refundable_remaining_qty as refundableRemainingQty from his_mirror_consume_link where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and ifnull(del_flag, 0) = 0 limit 1

select id, tenant_id as tenantId, visit_kind as visitKind, mirror_row_id as mirrorRowId, fetch_batch_id as fetchBatchId, dept_batch_consume_id as deptBatchConsumeId, dept_batch_consume_entry_id as deptBatchConsumeEntryId, alloc_qty as allocQty, dep_inventory_id as depInventoryId, returned_qty as returnedQty, refundable_remaining_qty as refundableRemainingQty, create_time as createTime from his_mirror_consume_link where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and visit_kind = #{visitKind} and mirror_row_id = #{mirrorRowId} and ifnull(del_flag, 0) = 0 and dep_inventory_id is not null order by create_time asc, id asc
